Next page 1 Organic & Vegan 2 Plant Stress Resistance 3 Conditions Soil A vegan soil supplement that enhances plant immune systems Levington Seaweed Tonic Multi Vitamin Supplement is a vegan soil supplement that enhances plant immune systems. Specially formulated seaweed tonic with micro-nutrients, a multivitamin supplement for the plants. Apply as a drench every 7-14 days, When sowing seeds, can be used to moisten the compost before and after sowing. Can also be used to feed lawns, apply to lawns monthly during spring and autumn. 100% organic and suitable for vegan gardeners. Bottle is made from 50% recycled plastic. Why should I use Levington Seaweed Tonic Multivitamin Supplement? Use as a soil supplement to enhance plants immune systems. Where can I use Levington Seaweed Tonic Multivitamin Supplement? Use to moisten the showing compost before and after sowing. Apply as a drench to pots after pricking out or placing of the cuttings. Apply to lawns monthly in spring and autumn. When should I use Levington Seaweed Tonic Multivitamin Supplement? This product can be applied all year long. Apply as a drench every 7-14 days. For lawns, apply monthly in spring and autumn. How do I use Levington Seaweed Tonic Multivitamin Supplement? Shake before use. Add required amount to water and stir well. Apply diluted solution to base of plant, avoiding foliage.
